name: InplaceEditor
description: Click-to-edit text/number field that swaps in an input.

api.name: InplaceEditor
api.description: Click-to-edit text/number field that swaps in an input.

examples.title: Basic Inplace Edit
examples.code:
<InplaceEditor @bind-Value="_name" Placeholder="Click to edit..." />

@code {
    private string? _name = "John Doe";
}

examples.title: Select Mode
examples.code:
<InplaceEditor @bind-Value="_status"
               EditMode="InplaceEditor.InplaceEditMode.Select"
               SelectOptions="@_options" />

@code {
    private string? _status = "Active";
    private List<string> _options = new() { "Active", "Inactive", "Pending" };
}

mdSummary:
# InplaceEditor

Click-to-edit text/number field that swaps in an input.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/inplace-editor

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| InplaceEditor | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | EditMode | `InplaceEditMode` | `InplaceEditMode.Text` |  |
| InplaceEditor | SelectOptions | `List<string>?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | SaveOnBlur | `bool` | `true` |  |
| InplaceEditor | SaveOnEnter | `bool` | `true` |  |
| InplaceEditor | ShowButtons | `bool` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | OnSave | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | OnCancel | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| InplaceEditor | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (InplaceEditor) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `OnSave` (`EventCallback<string>`)
- `OnCancel` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — OnKeyDown handles Escape in InplaceEditor.razor
- `Enter` — OnKeyDown handles Enter in InplaceEditor.razor

## Example
```razor
<InplaceEditor />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/InplaceEditor/InplaceEditor.razor`
